jobs.title: Part-Time Math Instructor and Mentor
jobs.description:
Do you love teaching children mathematics? If so, we’d love to meet you!
Competitively Paid Part-Time Math Instructor and Mentor to K-8 Students
in San Francisco, Pacifica, Oakland, Hayward, Menlo Park, Palo Alto, Los Altos, Portola Valley, Sunnyvale, Marin and other Bay Area locations (Weekday Late Afternoons and/or Weekends)
Great Pay: $60-75 per class hour | Flexible Hours | Fun, Rewarding & Low-Stress Work in Small Classes | Paid Training and Ongoing Professional Coaching
Descartes Learning Club (www.descarteslearningclub.com) is a boutique provider of premium math after-school enrichment classes in the San Francisco Bay Area.
Our raison d'être is to develop problem-solving minds and inspire a lifelong love for learning mathematics. Learn more at descarteslearningclub.com.
We would love to meet you if you have a mathematical background, share our mission, and love teaching children mathematics.
Logistics:
You will teach at one or more of our partner schools and locations (often with easy access to Muni or Bart for our SF locations) based on your availability to small classes of 1-6 students on weekdays for 1-2.5 hours between 3 pm and 6 pm and/or on weekends. Specific class schedules vary depending on the assigned classes during the school year and your schedule availability.
We are primarily hiring for the fall term and the 2026-2027 school year which starts in September 2026. We are looking for teachers who can at least commit to teaching the entire fall semester of 2026.
We also plan to expand into additional locations in the Bay Area. Whether you are available now or would like to stay in touch, please apply if you meet our qualifications.
Compensation:
We pay competitively at $60 - $75 per class hour you teach, depending on your academic and teaching background. We also compensate for professional training and student progress reports you will write.
For more information, visit our website
To apply: Please fill out this form (https://bit.ly/DLC-Job-Form) email us at info@descarteslearningclub.com with your resume.
Responsibilities include:
- Prepare and deliver engaging and informative lessons using the course materials and framework provided by the company. Mentor and guide children to develop problem-solving minds and a love for learning.
- Review students’ self-graded homework and use reasonable efforts to address questions in the classes.
- Promptly share each lesson’s recap and homework assignments with all the parents of the students via email after each lesson.
- Conduct assessments and provide timely feedback to students and families.
- Foster a positive and inclusive learning environment.
We believe that the best teaching results from a marriage of quality curriculum, teaching best practices, genuine human connections, and individualized adaptation in response to students’ progress. You will not be limited by the curriculum we provide, as we encourage your knowledge and passion to shine through creativity in the classroom.
Qualifications:
- Must have a solid background in mathematics. A bachelor's degree in math or a related field is preferred. We also consider undergraduate students majoring in math or a related field with math competition backgrounds and/or teaching experiences.
- Experience working with elementary and/or middle school students is preferred.
- Excellent communication and interpersonal skills. Enjoy working with children.
jobs.location: San Jose, CA, Los Gatos, CA, +15

companies.name: Descartes Learning Club
companies.description: Descartes Learning Club Corporation is a boutique provider of premium math after-school enrichment classes in San Francisco, CA. Descartes Learning Club’s raison d'être is to deliver world-class math education to young minds so that they love to learn, learn to think, and achieve greatness in life. We offer individualized, social, and in-person after-school K-12 math classes through micro class sizes of 1-6 students, expert instructors, customized curriculums, and convenient locations at school campuses.
